title: 2 x Silver 90 x 90cm Disposable Paper Table Cloth Cover for Square or Rectangular Dining Table Birthday Party, Catering, Baby Shower & Wedding Decorations By Zinnia
features: Disposable Convenience :- Paper table covers are perfect for single use, offering a hassle-free solution for parties, birthdays, and other events.
Ultimate Table Protection: Safeguard your tables from spills and stains with these durable disposable table cloths, ideal for various occasions.
Perfect Dimensions :- Each tablecloth measures 90cm x 90cm (approximately 35.4 x 35.4 inches), making it a great choice for small tables at home or outdoor gatherings.
Versatile Use :- Ideal for birthdays, picnics, and celebrations, these paper table covers are perfect for events in kitchens, dining rooms, or outdoor setups.
Compact & Stylish :- Available in colours like black, white, blue, green, yellow, gold, pink, and purple, the folded design ensures easy storage and transport.
description: Product Description Protects tables from spills, stains, and scratches during events. Made from durable paper material for reliable coverage and use. Suitable for indoor and outdoor dining, catering, and buffets. Enhances table decor while providing a practical disposable option. Available in square and rectangular sizes to fit various table types. Disposable Paper Tablecloth :- Perfect for keeping tables clean and stylish for any event or gathering. Ideal for Events :- Great for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, catering, and parties. Easy Cleanup :- Simply dispose of after use, saving time and effort on cleaning. Time-Saving Solution No washing required, just dispose of after use. Speeds up post-event cleanup, saving effort. Easy to Store & Carry :- Lightweight and foldable for compact storage. Convenient to transport for outdoor gatherings.
